chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2264 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.9673/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.05.2025 Mr. Mayhar Kazi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shamshad Ahmad, advocate for the respondent/SRB. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Khan, advocate for the respondent/PRA. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Essentially petitioner assails show cause notice issued by the Sindh Revenue Board. Per petitioner’s learned counsel, matter is covered by judgment of this court passed in Fatima Fertilizers reported as 2020 PTD 484. Counsel for the SRB in view of above submits that demand for the period of July 2018 to June 2019 is being withdrawn forthwith. He states that with respect to remaining issue, the show cause notice may be contested before the adjudicating authority and the same shall be decided in accordance with law, vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel further states that the pending subject adjudication, no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. It is jointly stated that petition be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
